meta.nazev: Souřadnice — oprav přehozené X a Y

cms.task_text: Kód má skočit na bod (80, 200), ale [hlp]X a Y jsou přehozeny[/hlp]. Opravte souřadnice.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_jump_to" x="50" y="50"><value name="X"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">200</field></shadow></value><value name="Y"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">80</field></shadow></value><next><block type="turtle_dot"><next><block type="turtle_jump_to"><value name="X"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">200</field></shadow></value><value name="Y"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">240</field></shadow></value><next><block type="turtle_dot"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
